name: project-intelligence
description: Project-level intelligence for specs, plans, standards, knowledge, graph context, systematic debugging, quality checks, lifecycle maintenance, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Project specs, standards, knowledge, graph context, debugging, lifecycle maintenance, and review checks.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence maintains a repository-local .project-intel knowledge base for project specs, standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, systematic debugging, quality checks, code review workflows, and post-task maintenance. Init detects optional graph tools without blocking noninteractive agents, while refresh, check, and maintain remain predictable and side-effect controlled.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository's standards, knowledge, tooling, and graph context.
Implement this requirement using project standards, reuse, impact analysis, and maintenance.
Investigate or review this change with project context, hard rules, and quality checks.
